title: Cyathea pilosissima
taxonomy: Cyathea pilosissima is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. The order Cyatheales is also a part of its classification, and it is further grouped into the family Cyatheaceae. Cyathea pilosissima is native to New Zealand and is often found in shaded, humid environments. The genus Cyathea is commonly referred to as the Australian tree ferns.
